name: session_start
description: Session startup workflow. Read state → diff DB → flag questions → report ready.

nodes.instruction: Read {P}/workspace/project_state.md. Confirm project type from first line (<!-- type: knowledge|project_management -->). Set {P} for this session. Summarize to user: 當前階段, 活躍任務 count, 未解問題 count, 資料庫現況.

nodes.description: LAZY: Do NOT preload active_rules_summary.md at startup. Instead use kb_index.py related/impacts on demand during work. This saves ~22KB (~7K tokens) per session.
nodes.instruction: Skip — do NOT preload active_rules_summary.md. Use kb.py search on demand during work instead.

nodes.description: If project has backlog.db (project_management type), run backlog.py summary and remind to show open P0/P1, blocked, and stale items. Skipped for knowledge-type projects.
nodes.instruction: Only if project type is 'project_management': run python shared/tools/backlog.py --project {P} summary, then python shared/tools/backlog.py --project {P} remind. Report open P0/P1, blocked, stale items. Skip entirely for 'knowledge' type projects.

nodes.description: Run kb_index.py validate to detect expired TTL, supersede inconsistencies, and semantic conflicts. Report any WARN/ERROR to user.
nodes.instruction: Run: python shared/tools/kb.py validate. Report any ERROR or WARN entries to user. Do not block session on WARN-only results. ERROR entries require user acknowledgment.

nodes.description: Check DB for changes since last session (new tables, row counts)
nodes.instruction: If {P}/workspace/db/*.db exists: run python shared/tools/db_schema.py show <db_path> --compact. Compare row counts with project_state.md 資料庫現況 block. Note any new tables or row count changes >10%.

nodes.description: Identify and flag open questions from project_state.md
nodes.instruction: Read '## 未解問題' section from project_state.md. If project_management type, also run: python shared/tools/backlog.py --project {P} list --status blocked. List all open questions clearly.

nodes.description: Report session ready status to user with context summary
nodes.instruction: Report in 3-5 bullet points: project type + {P}, 當前階段, active task count, open question count, KB health status, DB status. End with: 就緒，等待指示。
